name: Orange Roughy in Parchment
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F. (220 degrees C).
2. Cook the carrots in water for 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.
3. Cut parchment or foil into 2 large pieces, big enough to wrap each fillet.
4. Place half of the carrots and pea pods in the center of the foil.
5. Place a fillet on top of the vegetables.
6. Pour half of the lime juice over the fillet and sprinkle with paprika.
7. Scatter sliced olives and capers over the top of the fillet.
8. Sprinkle chopped parsley over the capers.
9. Fold the edges of the parchment or foil to completely enclose the fillet and seal them.
10. Place on a baking sheet and bake for 8-10 minutes.
11. To serve, place the packet on a serving dish and cut a slash in the top. Open slightly to let steam escape and serve.
Each package serves: Calories - Protein - Carbohydrates - Fiber - Fat - Saturated Fat - Cholesterol - Sodium
